serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL as of 2026-05-07. Key parameter changes: activate_project uses --project, find_symbol uses --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path), find_referencing_symbols requires --name_path and --relative_path (file, not dir). search_for_pattern requires --substring_pattern (literal string, not regex). Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel for multi-param calls. NEW (Run 5): bare receiver-method names like 'extractSafeOutputsConfig' return [] from find_symbol - must qualify as '(*Compiler).extractSafeOutputsConfig' (Go pointer-receiver form). get_symbols_overview reveals the qualified form.
